ResearchProjectDef.label: Leeani Wine Brewing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Learn the secrets of Leeani winemaking. The traditional Leeani soul wine is a psychically-attuned beverage brewed from specially cultivated grapes. Unlocks grape cultivation and wine production equipment.\n\nRequires Leeani researcher.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Automated Winemaking
ResearchProjectDef.description: Automate the careful production of Leeani wines with industrial-scale autovats. Unlocks autovats for wine production.\n\nRequires Leeani researcher.
